creative_film.label: 电影创意探索
creative_film.negative_prompt: no generic composition, no cliché visual language, no random style mixing, no emotional disconnect, no flat narrative, no derivative imagery
creative_film.camera_rule: one motivated camera move per shot, cinematic language required
creative_film.lighting_rule: deliberate lighting logic with emotional motivation for each light source

ecommerce.label: 电商产品
ecommerce.negative_prompt: no logo distortion, no text artifacts, no packaging collapse, no duplicate product, no label blur, no warped glass, no cap drift
ecommerce.camera_rule: single slow movement, product must stay center-frame
ecommerce.lighting_rule: light source must not obscure product labels or text

ugc.label: UGC 原生广告
ugc.negative_prompt: no extra fingers, no face drift, no lip mismatch, no background warping, no product disappearance, no shaky framing, no eye drift
ugc.camera_rule: slight handheld feel, maintain social-native pacing
ugc.performance_rule: one creator, one message beat, one simple gesture

cinematic.label: 电影感品牌短片
cinematic.negative_prompt: no shaky camera, no object melting, no random text, no muddy lighting, no flat blacks, no text watermark
cinematic.camera_rule: one motivated camera move per shot, no mixed movements
cinematic.lighting_rule: deliberate lighting logic with controlled contrast

multi_shot.label: 多镜头叙事
multi_shot.negative_prompt: no character drift between cuts, no scene inconsistency, no transition artifacts, no text watermark

one_shot.label: 一镜到底
one_shot.negative_prompt: no abrupt cuts, no spatial discontinuity, no object mutation between frames, no stutter in transitions, no frame-tearing
one_shot.camera_rule: continuous spatial flow, no hard cuts, one single camera movement through the sequence

viral_replicate.label: 爆款复刻
viral_replicate.negative_prompt: no style drift from reference, no subject identity loss, no mismatched pacing, no warped replacement subject, no original ghosting
viral_replicate.camera_rule: replicate reference video camera style and pacing

agent_mode.label: Agent 模式
agent_mode.negative_prompt: no text watermark, no shaky camera, no object melting, no style inconsistency
agent_mode.camera_rule: agent auto-selects camera style based on intent

short_drama.label: 短剧创作
short_drama.negative_prompt: no character face drift across episodes, no costume inconsistency, no scene discontinuity, no voice mismatch, no subtitle desync
short_drama.camera_rule: per-episode camera style preserved, character consistency across episodes

camera_language_presets.ecommerce_spin: Center frame, slow 180-degree orbit, white background, motion strength 2, 50mm lens
camera_language_presets.ecommerce_reveal: Slow push-in from product base to label, clean shadow floor, 85mm macro lens
camera_language_presets.ugc_talking_head: Eye-level, subtle handheld feel, medium shot waist-up, natural indoor lighting, motion strength 3
camera_language_presets.ugc_product_demo: Over-the-shoulder to product, gentle push-in, social review style, motion strength 3
camera_language_presets.cinematic_hero: Low angle to eye-level crane shot, 24mm wide, slow dramatic reveal, motion strength 5
camera_language_presets.cinematic_dolly: Side tracking dolly shot, subject moves through frame, 35mm lens, motion strength 5
camera_language_presets.multi_shot_sequence: Establishing wide → medium action → close-up emotion, varied angles per shot, motion strength 4

lighting_atmosphere_presets.ecommerce_clean: Soft overhead diffused light, pure white background, no shadows on product label, commercial product lighting
lighting_atmosphere_presets.ugc_indoor: Soft window daylight, subtle ring light catchlight, warm natural tone, genuine room feel
lighting_atmosphere_presets.golden_hour: Warm orange sunlight, long shadows, lens flare, cinematic backlighting
lighting_atmosphere_presets.cyberpunk: Neon blue and magenta lights, rainy street, wet reflections, high saturation
lighting_atmosphere_presets.noir: High contrast black and white, dramatic shadows, moody lighting, smoke
lighting_atmosphere_presets.luxury_studio: Three-point lighting, dark gradient background, rim light on product edges, premium feel
lighting_atmosphere_presets.dreamy: Soft focus, pastel colors, hazy atmosphere, glowing highlights

sound_design_presets.ecommerce_ambient: Subtle ambient drone, no distractions from product, clean electronic pad
sound_design_presets.ugc_vlog: Light upbeat lo-fi beat, background music stays below voice level, natural room tone
sound_design_presets.action: Fast-paced orchestral, heavy bass, synchronization with character hits
sound_design_presets.suspense: Low drone, heartbeat sound effect, sudden silence for tension
sound_design_presets.nature: Bird chirping, wind rustling leaves, gentle stream background
sound_design_presets.sci_fi: Electronic hum, robotic sounds, atmospheric synth pads, distant industrial reverb
sound_design_presets.emotional_piano: Solo piano, slow tempo, minor key, crescendo at payoff moment

l_cut.label: L-Cut (声音先于画面)
l_cut.keyword: audio continues as visual cuts to next shot
l_cut.best_for: 对话节奏、情绪延续、回忆转场

j_cut.label: J-Cut (画面先于声音)
j_cut.keyword: next shot's audio begins before visual appears
j_cut.best_for: 悬念预告、进入新场景、时间跳跃

jump_cut.label: Jump Cut (跳跃剪辑)
jump_cut.keyword: abrupt jump within same action, time compressed
jump_cut.best_for: 时间压缩、焦虑感、UGC 快节奏

match_cut.label: Match Cut (匹配剪辑)
match_cut.best_for: 形状/颜色/动作衔接、跨时空转场

smash_cut.label: Smash Cut (强切)
smash_cut.keyword: jarring smash cut to contrasting scene
smash_cut.best_for: 惊吓转场、梦境惊醒、反差冲击

montage.label: Montage (蒙太奇)
montage.keyword: rapid sequence of shots compressing time/events
montage.best_for: 时间流逝、训练过程、事件累积

creative_shoot.label: 创意拍摄复刻
creative_shoot.pattern: 参考[@视频]运镜，主体更换为[@图片]

classic_remake.label: 经典影视还原
classic_remake.pattern: 复刻[@视频]细节，人物替换成[角色]

viral_deconstruct.label: 爆款拆解再生
viral_deconstruct.pattern: 解析[@视频]爆点，借鉴风格重新创作

ecu.label: 大特写 (ECU)
ecu.description: 眼睛/手部细节，情绪极致放大

cu.label: 特写 (CU)
cu.description: 面部表情为主，肩部以上入画

mcu.label: 中近景 (MCU)
mcu.description: 胸部以上，保留部分肢体语言

ms.label: 中景 (MS)
ms.description: 腰部以上，人物与环境关系清晰

mls.label: 全景 (MLS)
mls.description: 全身入画，空间关系完整

static.label: 固定机位
static.motivation: 让画面内容自己说话，制造凝视感或紧张感

push_in.label: 推镜头 (Dolly In)
push_in.motivation: 拉近心理距离，强调重要性或揭示细节
push_in.prompt_hint: slow dolly push-in, camera moves toward subject

pull_out.label: 拉镜头 (Dolly Out)
pull_out.motivation: 拉开心理距离，揭示环境或表达孤立
pull_out.prompt_hint: slow dolly out, camera reveals wider context

pan_left_right.label: 横摇 (Pan)
pan_left_right.motivation: 跟随动作或扫描场景，保持观众方向感

tilt_up_down.label: 纵摇 (Tilt)
tilt_up_down.motivation: 揭示垂直空间关系（从脚到脸/从天到地）

tracking.label: 跟拍 (Tracking Shot)
tracking.motivation: 与角色同步移动，增强代入感和临场感
tracking.prompt_hint: tracking shot alongside subject, parallax background

arc_shot.label: 弧形运动 (Arc)
arc_shot.motivation: 环绕主体展示多角度，增加动态美感

crane_up.label: 升降 (Crane/Jib)
crane_up.motivation: 上帝视角转换，揭示场景全貌或制造戏剧性
crane_up.prompt_hint: crane shot rising above scene, aerial reveal

handheld.label: 手持 (Handheld)
handheld.motivation: 纪实感/不安定感/主观视角沉浸

dutch_angle.label: 荷兰角 (Dutch Tilt)
dutch_angle.motivation: 失衡/不安/疯狂/非正常状态

rack_focus.label: 变焦转移 (Rack Focus)
rack_focus.motivation: 引导注意力从一个焦点转移到另一个
rack_focus.prompt_hint: rack focus from foreground to background

rule_of_thirds.label: 三分法
rule_of_thirds.hint: 主体置于交叉点，最安全的基础构图

leading_lines.label: 引导线
leading_lines.hint: 利用线条引导视线至主体

frame_within_frame.label: 框中框
frame_within_frame.hint: 利用门窗/建筑结构创造层次感

symmetry.label: 对称构图
symmetry.hint: 居中对称，传达秩序/压迫/仪式感

negative_space.label: 留白
negative_space.hint: 大面积空旷空间，强调孤独/渺小/可能

depth_layers.label: 前景-中景-背景
depth_layers.hint: 三层空间分离，增加画面纵深感

golden_ratio.label: 黄金分割
golden_ratio.hint: 1:1.618 比例布局，古典美学平衡

three_point_classic.key_light: 主光 — 45度侧前方，塑造主体形态和主要明暗
three_point_classic.fill_light: 补光 — 对侧柔光，控制阴影深度
three_point_classic.rim_light: 轮廓光 — 后方逆光，勾勒边缘分离背景

chiaroscuro.label: 明暗对照法
chiaroscuro.hint: 极端明暗对比，戏剧性阴影，神秘氛围

natural_window.label: 自然窗光
natural_window.hint: 单一窗户光源，柔和渐变，真实生活感

practical_lights.label: 实景光源
practical_lights.hint: 仅用场景内现有灯具照明，高真实感

high_key.label: 高调布光
high_key.hint: 明亮均匀低对比，乐观轻盈氛围

low_key.label: 低调布光
low_key.hint: 大量阴影区域，局部光源，悬疑恐惧

magic_hour.label: 魔幻时刻
magic_hour.hint: 日出日落黄金时段，暖调长影，史诗浪漫

neon_noir.label: 霓虹黑色
neon_noir.hint: 人造霓虹主光源，冷暖强对比，赛博朋克

candlelight_intimacy.label: 烛光亲密感
candlelight_intimacy.hint: 单一点源暖光，面部明暗柔和过渡

overcast_diffused.label: 阴天漫射
overcast_diffused.hint: 无方向性柔光，灰色调，内省沉思

dialogue.note: 人声清晰度最高优先级

music.note: 不干扰对白的前提下烘托情绪

sfx_hard.note: 硬音效与画面动作精确同步

hope_rising.music: major key ascending melody, strings swell

melancholy_reflection.music: solo piano or cello, slow tempo minor

terror_sudden.music: cut to silence or sharp sting

christopher_nolan.hint: massive low-frequency impact, minimal dialogue in action sequences

denis_villeneuve.hint: sustained synthesizer pads, sound as architecture not decoration

wes_anderson.hint: percussive precision, music as narrative punctuation mark

david_fincher.trait: Trent Reznor & Atticus Ross electronic textures
david_fincher.hint: industrial ambient, sound design blurs into score

greta_gerwig.hint: diegetic music as character expression, dance sequences

wong_kar_wai.camera_hints: slow motion handheld, anamorphic lens flares, neon reflections
wong_kar_wai.mood_keywords: longing, urban loneliness, fleeting moments, unspoken love

christopher_nolan.camera_hints: IMAX camera sweep, continuous take illusions, macro-to-wide reveals
christopher_nolan.mood_keywords: obsession, time manipulation, moral ambiguity, spectacle

denis_villeneuve.camera_hints: slow deliberate movements, wide establishing shots, silhouettes
denis_villeneuve.mood_keywords: existential dread, cosmic awe, silence as language

akira_kurosawa.camera_hints: axial cuts through movement, weather as emotional mirror, geometric blocking
akira_kurosawa.mood_keywords: honor, fate, nature's indifference, human resilience

sofia_coppola.camera_hints: static observation, natural window light, intimate medium close-ups
sofia_coppola.mood_keywords: ennui, feminine interiority, luxury emptiness, quiet melancholy

hero_journey.label: 英雄之旅
phases: Ordinary World → Call → Refusal → Mentor → Threshold → Tests → Ordeal → Reward → Return

single_location.label: 单一场景
phases: One room, escalating tension through dialogue and revelation

visual_metaphors: time as flowing water / sand through fingers / melting clock
memory as fading photograph / overgrown ruins / echo chamber
freedom as open door / breaking surface / unfurling wings
isolation as island / empty theater / snow globe
transformation as butterfly emergence / season change / sunrise after night
anti_cliche_directives: avoid golden hour cliché — find unexpected light quality
no slow-motion flower petals — use original imagery
reject generic 'epic' — ground emotion in specific detail
ban color-grading shortcuts — motivate every hue choice
forbid default camera moves — every move must earn its existence

emotional_color_palettes.nostalgia_faded: #E8DCC4 warm beige, #B8A99A dusty rose, #7A8B99 muted blue-gray
emotional_color_palettes.anxiety_electric: #FF006E hot pink, #8338EC deep purple, #3A86FF electric blue
emotional_color_palettes.hope_emerging: #CAF0F8 pale sky, #ADE8F4 soft cyan, #90E0EF clear water blue
emotional_color_palettes.grief_muted: #2B2D42 dark navy, #8D99AE slate gray, #EDF2F4 cold white
